item.title:

item.description:
Boost your rewards from Pre-TGE projects with the Booster Program.
🔸 Complete weekly quests 🔸 Keep all your Alpha Points 🔸 Earn bonus token airdrops 🔸 Tokens unlock based on the project's timeline
Join today 👉 https://t.co/mJpvWe3zK4 https://t.co/u82kOR3ka7
--- @binance | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 334
item.author: @binance

item.title:

item.description:
Prime Sale, the most exclusive Pre-TGE on Binance Wallet.
Featuring more mature projects with strong development.
🔸 Spend Alpha Points to access 🔸 Deposit BNB to participate 🔸 Tokens unlock on the TGE date
Stay tuned for the next Prime Sale. https://t.co/Ti0De3Ttgl
--- @binance | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 185
item.author: @binance

item.title:
How to earn Alpha Points and unlock exclusive rewards.
Alpha Points are your gateway to TGEs, airdr...
item.description:
How to earn Alpha Points and unlock exclusive rewards.
Alpha Points are your gateway to TGEs, airdrops, Pre-TGEs, and more.
Total Alpha Points = Balance Points + Volume Points
🔸 Balance Points: Hold tokens on Binance Exchange or in Binance Wallet 🔸 Volume Points: Trade Alpha Tokens
Points reflect data from the last 15 days.
--- @binance | ❤️ 14 | 🔁 4 | 💬 12 | 👁 147
item.author: @binance
